items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
🔥【Original Quality】
LOULOU PUFFER Quilted Lambskin Bag, made of 100% lambskin, soft and delicate to the touch, like holding a cloud ☁️; featuring YSL metal logo, matte finish, and unique silver brushed metal hardware; satin lining, magnetic closure, one zippered interior pocket. Strap length: 52cm; folded strap length: 28cm
Size: 29x17x11cm
Model: 577476

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
【Manhattan 24cm】
New in-store synchronized Manhattan Baguette Small 24cm! The latest bag style, a flap Manhattan bag, replaces the classic logo with a low-key, minimalist design style. It is a bit like a Hermès Kelly, full of retro vibes! Combining business and casual, it is versatile! Can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, multi-functional, satisfying both business women and young girls! Carefully selected original factory leather, perfect stitching, exquisite hardware, exuding a high-end aura!
Model: 675626
Size: 24x17.5x6cm

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
【Top Original Quality】【SOLFERINO BOX】Turquoise
2020 IT BAG_ Must-have hot style, conquered the entire fashion circle before it even launched! Inspired by the Paris street name Rue De Solferino! The bag uses original factory fine pin-stitched Box calfskin, excellent texture and flexibility! Interior features a three-layer accordion pocket, easily accommodating daily essentials. The newly designed "L" letter top and bottom half-open clasp completely subverts your perception of bag clasps, making you exclaim, "It can actually open like this," simply too interesting!
Model: 634306
Size: 19×13×5cm

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
【Original Leather】🧏🏻‍♀️ White with Silver Hardware
Loulou Puffer mini_ Mini size #23CM Crossbody is here! The whole bag is made of soft Italian lambskin, featuring YSL's diagonal quilted craftsmanship. It has a soft front flap pocket, a detachable shoulder strap, and a buckle that allows it to be used as a storage bag or an underarm bag. Easily achieve multi-purpose use with one bag!
Size: 23×15.5×8.5cm
Model: 620333

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
【Genuine Leather】
#Envelope#Black with Black Buckle
Small Size Grained Embossed Quilted Leather Envelope Bag
Classic is eternal, the stunning V-pattern combined with the diamond-quilted caviar texture is very durable. Italian cowhide paired with a striking YSL logo, combining elegance and fashion! Very versatile, the small size has a large capacity, just look at the side to see how much it can hold!
Model: 526286
Size: 21x13x6cm

items.name_cn:
🆂🅰︎🅸🅽🆃 🅻🅰︎🆄🆁🅴🅽🆃
【 NiKi 】Versatile Style 28cm Saint Laurent Classic Niki Elephant Print Front Flap Leather Handbag. A super popular style among celebrities and influencers, hard to find at the counter! The globally popular Niki large capacity elephant print cowhide! Adorned with V-shaped visible stitching, CASSANDRE texture, lightweight, with two compartments, a large patch pocket on the back, and a sliding chain shoulder strap. Can be worn over the shoulder or crossbody, plus one external back pocket! Magnetic snap closure, two internal pockets!
Item No: 633178
Color: Black Elephant Print / Antique Silver Chain
Size: 28×20×8.5cm
Chain Length: 30 - 53cm

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
Monogram_Black with Gold Buckle Large Size Grained Embossed Quilted Leather Envelope Bag Classic is eternal, the stunning V-pattern caviar texture is very durable. Italian cowhide paired with a striking YSL logo, combining elegance and fashion! One chain, three ways to wear: single chain crossbody, double chain single shoulder, single chain single shoulder are all perfect. Different heights of fairies, there is always a carrying method that suits you. Oops, it's a heart-fluttering feeling!
Model: 26588
Size: 31×22×7.5cm
